input.subject: Q1 contract renewal
input.body: Hi - we're up for renewal next month. Can you send the new terms?
input.intent: Acknowledge and route to account manager.

expected.subject: Re: Q1 contract renewal
expected.body: Hi Alice, thanks for reaching out. I'll loop in your account manager today to send the updated terms and walk you through any changes. Talk soon.

input.subject: Bug in dashboard
input.body: The export button doesn't work in Chrome.
input.intent: Apologize, get repro details, set expectation.

expected.subject: Re: Bug in dashboard
expected.body: Hi Bob, sorry about the trouble! Could you share which Chrome version you're on and a screenshot of what happens when you click export? I'll route this to engineering as soon as I have the details.

input.subject: Pricing question for Enterprise plan
input.body: Hi, we have a team of 45 engineers and are evaluating your Enterprise tier. What does it cost per seat, and do you offer annual discounts?
input.intent: Acknowledge interest, confirm pricing requires a sales call.

expected.subject: Re: Pricing question for Enterprise plan
expected.body: Hi Priya, thanks for your interest in our Enterprise plan — a team of 45 engineers is a great fit for what we offer at that tier. Enterprise pricing is customized based on team size and feature requirements, so I'd love to set up a brief call with one of our account executives to walk you through the numbers and any available annual discounts. Would you be available for a 30-minute call this week?

input.subject: New feature idea: Slack integration
input.body: Would love to see a native Slack integration so our on-call team gets alerts without logging in. Just an idea!
input.intent: Thank the user and acknowledge the feature request.

expected.subject: Re: New feature idea: Slack integration
expected.body: Hi Liam, thanks so much for the suggestion — a Slack integration for on-call alerts is a great idea and something we've heard from other teams too. I've logged this in our product feedback tracker so the team can evaluate it. We'll reach out if it makes it onto the roadmap!

input.subject: Unacceptable downtime — need answers
input.body: Your platform was down for 3 hours yesterday during our peak sales window. We lost an estimated $80,000 in revenue. I expect a detailed incident report and a credit on our account.
input.intent: Apologize sincerely, commit to providing incident report, escalate internally.

expected.subject: Re: Unacceptable downtime — need answers
expected.body: Dear CEO team at BigRetail, I sincerely apologize for yesterday's outage and the significant impact it had on your business. A 3-hour disruption during peak hours is completely unacceptable, and I fully understand your frustration. I am escalating this to our VP of Engineering today to prepare a detailed incident report, including root cause and remediation steps. I will also initiate a credit review for your account. You will hear back from me by end of business tomorrow.

input.subject: Invoice #INV-2048 not received
input.body: We were expecting invoice INV-2048 for the March billing cycle but haven't received it. Can you resend?
input.intent: Acknowledge and confirm invoice will be resent.

expected.subject: Re: Invoice #INV-2048 not received
expected.body: Hi there, apologies for the inconvenience. I've flagged invoice INV-2048 for our billing team to resend to your address on file today. If you need it sent to a different contact, just reply with their email and we'll update our records.

input.subject: Demo request
input.body: Hi, I saw your product at SaaStr and I'd love a live demo for our 12-person design team. We're evaluating tools for Q3.
input.intent: Confirm demo and propose scheduling link.

expected.subject: Re: Demo request
expected.body: Hi Maria, great meeting you at SaaStr! I'd love to show the product to your design team. Here's a link to book a 30-minute demo at a time that works for you: calendly.com/demo. Looking forward to connecting!

input.subject: Refund request — order ORD-9912
input.body: I cancelled my subscription 2 days into the billing cycle but was charged the full monthly amount of $299. I'd like a prorated refund for the unused 28 days.
input.intent: Acknowledge the refund request and set expectation on review timeline.

expected.subject: Re: Refund request — order ORD-9912
expected.body: Hi J. Taylor, thank you for reaching out about order ORD-9912. I'm sorry to hear about the billing confusion after your cancellation. I've submitted a refund review request to our billing team for the prorated amount covering the 28 unused days. Refund reviews typically complete within 3–5 business days, and you'll receive a confirmation email once it's processed. I'll personally follow up if we need any additional information from you.
